tools.name: schema-validator
tools.description: Validates if data conforms to a JSON schema. Returns valid:true/false and an error message on failure.

tools.name: drift-detector
tools.description: Detects differences between an actual API response and an expected JSON schema. Reports missing_required (error), type_mismatch (error), enum_violation (error), missing_optional (warning), unexpected_field (info). Recurses into nested objects.

tools.name: breaking-change-analyzer
tools.description: Analyzes breaking changes between two schema versions. Detects: field removal, type changes, newly required fields, enum value removal, constraint tightening.
